title: clerodendrum robustum
intro: Clerodendrum robustum, also known as the robust glory bower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum robustum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
